message:
chore(beads): close rch fallback storm issues bd-3qfty and bd-3qfty.3

Mark bd-3qfty (parent: prevent local cargo fallback storms) and
bd-3qfty.3 (enforce remote-only rch in persistence fault-injection
runner) as closed/done.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"bd-3q6z","title":"Unit: config precedence + patch_settings invariants","description":"# Goal
Cover configuration precedence and patching behavior without mocks so settings remain deterministic and auditable.

# Scope
- Precedence: env overrides > project > global defaults (PI_CONFIG_PATH, PI_* dirs).
- `patch_settings` deep-merge semantics; no field clobbering.
- Permissions: config file written with restrictive perms.
- Invalid JSON / missing files fall back to defaults with warnings.

# Logging
- Use TestHarness to record config paths and serialized settings snapshots.

# Acceptance Criteria
- Tests in `tests/config.rs` or new `tests/config_precedence.rs`.
- Deterministic; no network or external state.
- Explicit assertions for precedence + merge invariants.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T04:58:42.767913355Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T07:12:42.246176076Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T07:12:42.246109522Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3q6z","depends_on_id":"bd-102","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T04:58:42.797660468Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3q6z","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"related","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:51:56.741415760Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3qca","title":"Interactive: /reload rebuilds autocomplete sources","description":"# Goal
Ensure `/reload` rebuilds the autocomplete provider so that:
- new prompt templates appear in slash autocomplete
- new skills appear as `/skill:name`
- removed resources disappear

# Dependencies
- Requires autocomplete provider infrastructure (`bd-28rk`, `bd-28t8`).

# Acceptance Criteria

 {"id":"bd-3qfty.1","title":"[Support][bd-3qfty] Add strict rch gating for provider/runtime-risk helper scripts","description":"Extend compile-storm mitigation to helper scripts with direct cargo invocations by adding explicit --require-rch/--no-rch behavior and fail-closed default when strict mode is requested.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CyanBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-17T14:05:46.891235653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-17T14:09:19.986045559Z","closed_at":"2026-02-17T14:09:19.986023147Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["infra","performance","rch","swarm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3qfty.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3qfty","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-17T14:05:46.891235653Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":2058,"issue_id":"bd-3qfty.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed non-overlap strict rch gating on helper scripts with explicit override/require flags and fail-closed remote mode when rch is selected.\n\nDelivered:\n- scripts/provider_registry_guardrails.sh\n  - added --no-rch / --require-rch / --help\n  - added runner selection and run_cargo wrapper\n  - when rch mode enabled, executes with RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true by default\n- scripts/e2e/run_runtime_risk_telemetry.sh\n  - added --no-rch / --require-rch / --help\n  - added runner selection and run_cargo wrapper\n  - when rch mode enabled, executes with RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true by default\n\nValidation:\n- bash -n scripts/provider_registry_guardrails.sh\n- bash -n scripts/e2e/run_runtime_risk_telemetry.sh\n- scripts/provider_registry_guardrails.sh --help\n- scripts/e2e/run_runtime_risk_telemetry.sh --help\n- scripts/provider_registry_guardrails.sh --require-rch (pass; 119 tests)\n- scripts/e2e/run_runtime_risk_telemetry.sh --require-rch (pass; 116 tests)","created_at":"2026-02-17T14:09:12Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3qm","title":"Keybindings: load ~/.pi/agent/keybindings.json + merge","description":"# Goal
Load user keybinding overrides from `~/.pi/agent/keybindings.json` and merge them over the default bindings.

# Required Behavior
- File location: `~/.pi/agent/keybindings.json` (legacy).
- JSON shape: object mapping actionId → string | string[]. Example:
  ```json
  {
    "cursorUp": ["up", "ctrl+p"],
    "cursorDown": ["down", "ctrl+n"],
    "deleteWordBackward": ["ctrl+w", "alt+backspace"]
  }
  ```
- User values override defaults for that action.
- Unknown actions: ignore with warning/diagnostic.
- Invalid key strings: ignore with warning/diagnostic.

# Implementation Notes
- Prefer loading once at startup, and allow reload via `/reload` in a later task.
- Thread-safety: interactive mode should hold an immutable snapshot of bindings.
- Diagnostics should be visible to the user (startup header warning or `/reload` status), but must not abort startup.

# Dependencies
- Needs the action catalog + parser.

# Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Overrides take effect in interactive mode.
- [ ] Invalid config never crashes startup.
- [ ] Diagnostics are actionable (include file path and failing key/action).","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"claude-opus","created_at":"2026-02-03T19:36:30.244375962Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:25:16.502534521Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T20:00:18.928426465Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3qm","depends_on_id":"bd-103","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:01Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3qm","depends_on_id":"bd-3ip","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:01Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3qm","depends_on_id":"bd-cru","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:01Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":135,"issue_id":"bd-3qm","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Keybindings user config loading implementation complete.

**Added to src/keybindings.rs:**

1. **KeyBindingsLoadResult struct:**
   - Holds loaded bindings + path + warnings
   - has_warnings() and format_warnings() helpers

2. **KeyBindingsWarning enum:**
   - ReadError - file read failure
   - ParseError - invalid JSON
   - UnknownAction - unrecognized action ID
   - InvalidKey - unparseable key string
   - InvalidKeyValue - wrong type (not string)

3. **KeyBindings methods:**
   - user_config_path() → ~/.pi/agent/keybindings.json
   - load_from_user_config() → loads with diagnostics
   - load_from_path_with_diagnostics() → full implementation

**Behavior:**
- Missing file returns defaults with no warnings (normal case)
- Invalid JSON returns defaults with ParseError warning
- Unknown actions logged and ignored
- Invalid keys logged and skipped (valid keys still applied)
- Never fails/crashes - always returns valid bindings

**Config format supported:**
```json
{
  "cursorUp": ["up", "ctrl+p"],
  "cursorDown": "down"
}
```
- Values can be string or array of strings
- Action IDs are camelCase (matching AppAction serde format)

**Tests added (7 new):**
- test_load_from_nonexistent_path_returns_defaults
- test_load_valid_override
- test_load_warns_on_unknown_action
- test_load_warns_on_invalid_key
- test_load_warns_on_invalid_json
- test_load_handles_invalid_value_type
- test_warning_display_format

Total: 39 keybindings tests passing.
","created_at":"2026-02-03T19:59:11Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3qo","title":"Test infra: mock services + secrets redaction for deterministic runs","description":"Background:
- Extensions often touch network/secrets; tests must be deterministic and safe.

Steps:
- Provide mock HTTP server with canned responses for networked extensions.
- Define secrets injection strategy (env vars + redaction in logs).
- Add helpers to create isolated temp workspaces per scenario.
- Provide deterministic time and random seeds for repeatable runs.

Logging requirements:
- Logs must redact secrets and include mock server request traces.

Acceptance:
- Tests run offline with deterministic outputs and safe logs.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
